holdings.infoBox: PCLG is an equity ETF with a total of 26 individual holdings. The top holdings are Amazon.com stock at 9.46%, Microsoft at 7.61%, Eli Lilly and Company at 6.03%, Alphabet at 5.98%, and Broadcom at 5.57%.

overview.description: The Polen Focus Growth ETF (PCLG) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in large cap equity. The fund is an actively managed ETF that invests in large-cap growth stocks from anywhere in the world. PCLG was launched on Sep 30, 2025 and is issued by Polen.
